text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
9 
MDCD_BEHAVIORAL_COV_MOS 
LABEL: 
Medicaid Managed Care Mental Health or Substance Abuse Coverage Months 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary was enrolled in a Medicaid 
managed care mental health or substance abuse managed care plan. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS DE file (derived) 
VALUES: 
0–12 or null/missing (if no Medicaid enrollment) 
COMMENT: 
CCW
